promoted_facts.fact: Hilton affiliates revenue from franchisees in 2024 was $1,101,161,898 (excluding royalty/program fees, HSM)
HSM revenues: $19,614,010 rebates/allowances + $38,697,912 admin fees + $8,763,692 goods/services in 2024
Required purchases estimated at 15%–20% of establishment cost and 2%–5% of operating expenses
New Development must start within 16 months, complete within 36 months of approval
2 eforea spas in franchised hotels, 3 in company-managed as of Dec 31, 2024. Zero restaurants under Restaurant Brands.
Groups360 LLC equity interest held by Hilton JV Acquisition LLC (affiliate) — third-party group booking vendor
Hilton Advance Purchase Program: 4.5% fee on advance payments; digital payments option (Google Pay, Apple Pay) via Adyen N.V.
Subsequent events note references March 18, 2024 but context indicates March 18, 2025 (audit opinion date) — likely typographical error in FDD
